AMD unveils new accelerator roadmap ahead of earnings

Advanced Micro Devices said it will ship a new accelerator platform in the second half of the year and highlighted stronger backlog trends with cloud customers. Executives described demand from AI infrastructure buyers as broadening beyond experimental deployments and said supply constraints have eased compared with the prior quarter.

Analysts covering the company noted that the update could improve revenue expectations for the data center segment, although they also said the next earnings report still needs to prove that margins can expand while the product mix shifts. Several broker notes described the announcement as a constructive read-through for near-term sentiment.
